overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a first-person walk through a rocky canyon at golden hour. The camera moves steadily along a wet stream bed past weathered rock formations and sparse vegetation under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon floor with dry stream bed

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the height of the cliff face on the right
dead tree on the left passes out of view behind the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the canyon while observing the rock formations and vegetation

entered.detail: leafless gnarled tree trunk standing beside the path
tall weathered rock wall with layered sedimentary texture
wet muddy trail winding through the canyon floor
hazy rock formations visible on the horizon
clusters of purple flowering plants along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow canyon floor with a dead tree standing to the left. The camera walks forward along a wet dirt path, passing purple wildflowers on the right. Around 8 seconds, the view tilts up to reveal the imposing cliff face towering overhead, then returns to level as the dead tree passes out of view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet canyon floor with reflective pools and lush vegetation

events.description: ground becomes saturated with large reflective water pools covering the path
path curves slightly to the right passing a dead tree on the right side

agents.ego_description: navigating through the canyon while avoiding deeper water pools on the path

entered.detail: shallow water reflecting the pink sky and clouds
large boulders and rock outcrops blocking the distant view
patches of yellow-green grass growing beside the water
extensive reflective water surface covering the trail
mirror-like water surface showing sky reflections
second leafless tree trunk visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the canyon, the ground becomes increasingly wet with large reflective pools covering the path. The cliff face recedes slightly to the mid-distance while rock formations ahead become more prominent. Yellow grass and lush vegetation line the banks, and a second dead tree appears on the right as the path curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: opening canyon approach with distant rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the open area ahead as the canyon walls recede

entered.detail: large rock formation emerging on the left horizon
new clusters of purple flowers along the right path edge

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens up as the camera moves past the water pools onto drier ground. The cliff face on the right fades into the distance while rock formations ahead draw closer. New purple wildflowers appear along the path, and the sky becomes more visible as the enclosing walls recede, revealing a wider landscape ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a narrow, enclosed canyon that gradually opens into a wider, expansive landscape. It begins on a wet dirt path beside a dead tree and purple wildflowers, with the camera tilting upward to reveal the imposing cliff face towering overhead before leveling out. As the camera moves deeper, the ground transforms into a series of large reflective pools and the path curves past lush yellow grass and another dead tree. The scene then shifts as the camera leaves the water for drier ground, causing the enclosing cliff walls to recede into the distance. Finally, the view expands toward prominent rock formations and fresh clusters of purple wildflowers under an increasingly visible sky.
